commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a memory reranker SDK surface, moves built-in MMR into a bundled memory-mmr plugin, and adds an external Cohere-compatible memory reranker plugin with docs, config, tests, and dependency metadata changes.

PR surface: Source +833, Tests +793, Docs +813, Config +112, Other -96. Total +2455 across 79 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: this is a new feature/API PR. The PR body does provide real runtime log proof that the proposed plugin can call an external reranker during memory recall.
